creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Starting Spyder shows this:
/home/auser > spyder3
Trace/BPT trap

In logfiles this:
kernel: pid 1186 (python3.8), jid 0, uid 1001: exited on signal 5

Remaining processes:
 # ps auw | grep python
auser 1101  0,0  7,8 181556  80116  0  I    15:28   0:06,41 /usr/local/bin/python3.8 -u plugin_server.py 29040 jedi
auser 1102  0,0  5,7 160384  58888  0  I    15:28   0:02,50 /usr/local/bin/python3.8 -u plugin_server.py 49269 fallback
auser 1189  0,0  7,2 174204  73468  2  I    15:34   0:06,02 /usr/local/bin/python3.8 -u plugin_server.py 45821 rope
auser 1190  0,0  8,0 181556  81852  2  I    15:34   0:05,89 /usr/local/bin/python3.8 -u plugin_server.py 45822 jedi
auser 1191  0,0  5,9 160384  60588  2  I    15:34   0:02,04 /usr/local/bin/python3.8 -u plugin_server.py 45823 fallback

Note: jupyter-qtconsole works as intended.
